__inputs.name: DS_POSTGRES
__inputs.label: PostgreSQL
__inputs.description: Select your PostgreSQL datasource for meter_readings

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM meter_readings ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT time AS "time", v_r_ph AS value, meter_name AS metric FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;
SELECT time AS "time", v_y_ph AS value, meter_name AS metric FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;
SELECT time AS "time", v_b_ph AS value, meter_name AS metric FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;
SELECT time AS "time", a_r_ph AS value, meter_name AS metric FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;
SELECT time AS "time", a_y_ph AS value, meter_name AS metric FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;
SELECT time AS "time", a_b_ph AS value, meter_name AS metric FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;
SELECT frequency FROM meter_readings ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT pf_ave FROM meter_readings ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT DISTINCT meter_name FROM meter_readings ORDER BY meter_name;
SELECT time AS "time", v_r_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 10000;

SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'v_r_ph') AS metric, v_r_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'v_r_ph' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'v_y_ph') AS metric, v_y_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'v_y_ph' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'v_b_ph') AS metric, v_b_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'v_b_ph' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'a_r_ph') AS metric, a_r_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'a_r_ph' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'a_y_ph') AS metric, a_y_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'a_y_ph' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'a_b_ph') AS metric, a_b_ph AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'a_b_ph' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'pf_ave') AS metric, pf_ave AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'pf_ave' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
UNION ALL
SELECT time AS "time", (meter_name || ' ' || 'frequency') AS metric, frequency AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND meter_name ~ '${meter_name:regex}' AND 'frequency' ~ '${parameter:regex}'
ORDER BY 1 ASC
LIMIT 10000;

list.name: meter_name
list.label: Meter
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT meter_name FROM meter_readings ORDER BY meter_name;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT meter_name FROM meter_readings ORDER BY meter_name;
